content_body: Six of us (3 couples) stayed at this property from 12/23 to 12/28/17 and it was amazing. The cabin was decorated beautifully for Christmas and even had a small tree which was a lovely touch. The river rock accents throughout the cabin are amazing, especially in the bathrooms where you felt like you were taking a shower in a waterfall. We had plenty of room - each of us had our own floor and bathroom - which gave us all privacy if we wanted. We played games downstairs, enjoyed the hot tub and thoroughly relaxed. We had plenty of hot water & the washer/dryer came in very handy. We did a fair bit of cooking and I have to comment on how well the kitchen was stocked with dishes, pans, platters, appliances, etc. There was both a Keurig and a drip coffee maker, lots of Tupperware & serving bowls and everything else you can think of. We enjoyed the patio fireplace and the quietness of the area. We did lots of exploring, hiking, shopping & eating and the cabin location, although a little far from downtown, was within easy driving distance from everything. I would highly recommend this cabin - it was clean upon arrival and we did not experience any issues. One note, it is a little hard to find so make sure you follow the directions from the owners.
title: Outfitted With Everything We Needed For A Christmas Getaway!
